properties.notes: Official page says Butano Trail Camp is open to backpackers and reservations are required; Ben Ries Campground is closed indefinitely. Coordinates are an approximate park/trail-camp planning anchor, not a surveyed tent pad.

properties.notes: Official park page lists tent camping, group campsites, hike-and-bike campsites, water, restrooms/showers, and ReserveCalifornia reservations. Use Francis Beach as the campground anchor.

properties.routeName: Pacific Coast Highway: San Francisco to Santa Cruz

properties.notes: Official page lists hike-and-bike campsites, tent camping, RV/trailer sites, water, and restrooms/showers. Same page separately says no hike-in campsites, so treat as bike-accessible campground, not backcountry.
